packageRules.description: One rmlext release = npm packages + OCI image + contract crate at the SAME version. Group their bumps into a single atomic PR so keasy never lands a mismatched set (e.g. npm 0.3.1 with image 0.3.0).
Pin the fossil base image by digest for reproducible server builds; Renovate refreshes the digest when the tag moves.
The fossil-run-status git-dep tracks rmlext release tags (vX.Y.Z).

customManagers.description: Bump the FOSSIL_IMAGE build-arg pin in server/Dockerfile.
